pages.text:
NovaCloud Analytics Inc.

Period: Q2 2024

NovaCloud Analytics Inc. ("NovaCloud") is a B2B SaaS platform providing cloud-based analytics and observability tools to
mid-market e-commerce and digital businesses across North America and Western Europe.

Key Financial & Operating Metrics

| Metric | Q2 2024 |
| --- | --- |
| Total Billings(USD) | $5.8M |
| End-of-Period ARR | $24.1M |
| Gross Margin | 74% |
| Net Dollar Retention(LTM) | 115% |
| Logo Churn Rate(LTM) | 7.8% |
| Cash Balance | $29.5M |
| Monthly Net Burn | ($0.98M) |
| Cash Runway | ~30 months |
| Total Headcount | 112 |

Go-to-Market & Pipeline

| Stage | \# Opportunities | Total Pipeline | Weighted Value |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Qualified | 28 | 7.4M | 3.1M |
| Proposal / Negotiation | 14 | 5.6M | 2.8M |
| Verbal Commit | 4 | 2.1M | 1.5M |

Key Risks

Total Billings of $5.8M in Q2 2024 reflects the transaction-based revenue model. New logo additions in the quarter totalled 8.
Expansion revenue contributed $0.8M to Total Billings, consistent with the land-and-expand motion across mid-market accounts.
Cloud infrastructure costs represented approximately 28% of Total Billings, with ongoing optimisation expected to improve this ratio
through the year.

(1) Total Billings includes all revenue recognized in the period under ASC 606.

• Geographic expansion into Western Europe adding execution complexity.

(2) Net Dollar Retention and Logo Churn are presented on a last-twelve-months (LTM) basis.

(3) Monthly Net Burn reflects operating cash outflows only; excludes one-time items.

(4) Pipeline figures reflect management estimates; Weighted Value applies stage-level probability haircuts.
